moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week Underway
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are in their second week, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Fourth Round matches playing today and Quarter-finals coming up on July 7-8.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Wimbledon's second week is serving up serious drama! Who are you backing for the Quarter-finals?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Still got British players in contention at Wimbledon! The second week is always electric. Catch the action before the finals this weekend.

moments.title: British Grand Prix Concludes at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix 2026 concluded today, July 5th, at the iconic Silverstone Circuit, wrapping up a weekend of high-speed racing.

angles.name: Race Day Reaction
angles.copy: Chequered flag! The British Grand Prix at Silverstone has just finished. What a race! Who was your standout driver today?

angles.name: Silverstone Buzz
angles.copy: The roar of the engines fades as the British GP wraps up. Relive the best moments from Silverstone 2026!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Round of 16 Intensifies
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues with thrilling Round of 16 matches, including Argentina vs Egypt and Switzerland vs Colombia on Tuesday, July 7.

angles.name: Knockout Stage Heat
angles.copy: It's knockout football at the World Cup! Argentina take on Egypt on Tuesday. Who's making it to the Quarter-finals?

angles.name: Big Match Build-up
angles.copy: Switzerland vs Colombia is another huge Round of 16 clash coming up on Tuesday. Get ready for some nail-biting action!

moments.title: Tour de France Stages Roll On
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France, which began yesterday in Barcelona, continues today with Stage 2 and moves into its mountain stages early next week.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Chase
angles.copy: The Tour de France is well underway! Who's looking strong for the yellow jersey after the early stages?

angles.name: Mountain Challenges Ahead
angles.copy: Stage 3 of the Tour de France on Monday heads into the mountains. Expect some epic climbs and fierce competition!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes over Moseley Park, Birmingham, from July 10-12, featuring a diverse lineup of UK and international artists.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival hits Birmingham next Friday. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Three days of incredible jazz, funk, and soul in Moseley Park. Grab your tickets for a weekend of pure vibes!

moments.title: Henley Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Henley Festival, the UK's only black-tie music and arts festival, runs from July 8-12, featuring acts like Boy George & Culture Club, Ezra Collective, and Sugababes.

angles.name: Glamour & Music
angles.copy: Dust off your black tie! Henley Festival starts next Wednesday with Boy George & Culture Club leading the lineup.

angles.name: Star-studded Nights
angles.copy: From Sugababes to Ezra Collective, Henley Festival promises five nights of incredible music and arts on the riverside. Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally
moments.blurb: The Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace in London on Saturday, July 11th, offering a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Fun
angles.copy: London! Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace next Saturday. Get ready for a huge day of music and good times!

angles.name: One Day Wonder
angles.copy: A full day of festival fun without the camping? Yes please! Kaleidoscope Festival, Ally Pally, July 11th.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 is in full swing, with recent Casa Amor recoupling causing major villa drama and new islanders shaking things up.

angles.name: Villa Fallout
angles.copy: The Casa Amor dust has barely settled on Love Island! Who's dealing with the fallout, and whose head has been completely turned?

angles.name: New Bombshells
angles.copy: Another week, another wave of drama in the Love Island villa. Are you keeping up with all the new arrivals and their connections?

moments.title: New ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: The new six-part murder drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish Highlands and starring Laura Donnelly, is set to premiere on ITV and ITVX on July 12.

angles.name: Scottish Crime
angles.copy: Chilling new murder drama 'The Dark' hits ITV next Monday. Get ready for twists and turns in the Scottish Highlands!

angles.name: Next Must-Watch
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge-worthy thriller? 'The Dark' is set to be a gripping watch when it lands on ITVX.

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premieres on BBC One and BBC iPlayer on July 11th.

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' lands on BBC One next Saturday. Expect dry wit and futuristic laughs.

angles.name: Comedy Gold
angles.copy: If you love Diane Morgan, you'll want to tune into 'Ann Droid' on the BBC from July 11th. It's being called 'the new Motherland'!

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: The school summer holidays have officially begun for many children across the UK, with some areas starting as early as July 1st.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: School's OUT! Summer holidays have officially started for many across the UK. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The kids are off! Wishing everyone a fantastic start to the summer holidays. Time for adventures!

moments.title: UK Set for July Heatwave
moments.blurb: High pressure is building across the UK, bringing forecasts of rising temperatures into the high 20s and low 30s Celsius next week, with heatwave conditions likely in parts of the South East.

angles.name: Sunshine Alert
angles.copy: Get ready to soak it up! A heatwave is on its way for parts of the UK next week, with temperatures set to climb.

angles.name: Summer Heat
angles.copy: Forecast update: high 20s and potentially low 30s for some areas next week! Time to find that paddling pool.

moments.title: Happy 76th to Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday today, July 5th. He's known for hits like 'The Power of Love' and 'Workin' for a Livin'.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

moments.title: Paul Weller Turns 68
moments.blurb: Paul Weller, 'The Modfather' and influential musician from The Jam and The Style Council, celebrates his 68th birthday today, July 5th.

angles.name: Modfather's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the iconic Paul Weller! From The Jam to The Style Council and his solo career, a true legend.

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Beck Turns 56
moments.blurb: Multi-Grammy Award-winning musician Beck, known for his eclectic style and hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', celebrates his 56th birthday on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! Which of his genre-bending albums is your go-to?

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, lead singer of Hole and cultural icon, celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fearless Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Jack White, the acclaimed musician, singer, songwriter, and producer best known for his work with The White Stripes, turns 51 on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! What's your favourite White Stripes riff?

moments.title: Perrie Edwards' 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards will celebrate her 33rd birthday on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to Little Mix's very own Perrie Edwards! What's your favourite Little Mix hit?

moments.title: Richie Sambora Turns 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi anthem he helped create?

moments.title: Lil' Kim's 52nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, model, and actress Lil' Kim, known as 'The Queen Bee', celebrates her 52nd birthday on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! Drop your favourite track in the comments!
